user.label: Navigation related to your user account

register.title: Registration
register.intro: After registering, we will send you a link to verify your e-mail address. You can login after verifying your e-mail address.

login.title: Login
login.nav-label: If you can't login, use these links.

forgot.title: Can't login?
forgot.intro: If you can't access your user account, we can send you either your user name or a link that resets your password. Simply select either password or user name, and provide your e-mail address. If you have forgotten the password, you will also need to enter your username.

reset-password.title: Reset password
reset-password.intro: Enter your new password. After saving you can login using your new password.

resend-verification.title: Resend verification link
resend-verification.intro: If your verification link has expired, you can request a new link to verify your e-mail-address. Please supply the e-mail address and the username.

password.headline: Change Password
password.intro: You can change your password by entering the current password and the new password.

profile.headline: Update Profile
profile.intro: You can change your E-Mail address and/or your username. If you update either, you will be logged out and need to login with the new data. If you update the E-Mail address, you will need to verify it by clicking on the link.

two-factor.headline: Two-Factor authentication
two-factor.intro: Two-factor authentication uses a {totp}. You will need an appropriate app, like Google/Microsoft Authenticator or {tool1} / {tool2}. To activate, you need to provide your password.

legend.required: Fields marked with a {icon} are required.
legend.password: When entering your password, we check if the password is secure enough. Insecure passwords are rejected.
